docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $192.50 SERVED APR-11-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARRASCO, NORA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, HEATHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRASCO, NORA $233.93 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $408.93, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT ON THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $169.75, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID BY THE DEFENDANT TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY WILSON, HEATHER AS TO DEFENDANT CARRASCO, NORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY DEFENDANT CARRASCO, NORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS L. FONG AND P. NATT; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2016 - JUDGMENT.
